description: A DHS recruitment graphic in landscape format on a blue background. On the left is an angled-frame stock photo of two people in business attire (a man in a suit and a woman) looking together at a folder of documents. On the right, large bold white text reads 'WE ARE HIRING.' Below it is the DHS seal next to the event logo 'DHS CAREER EXPO' (with 'EXPO' set large). Event details in yellow and white text: 'June 27-28, 2024 | 10 am - 6 pm ET' and 'Dulles Expo Center | Chantilly, VA.' A small line at the bottom-right reads 'Join DHS. Make an impact.'
notable_text: WE ARE HIRING; DHS CAREER EXPO; June 27-28, 2024 | 10 am - 6 pm ET; Dulles Expo Center | Chantilly, VA; Join DHS. Make an impact.
